---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_raw/
    methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
# you can only use the load_HDF5_methrix if you saved it as an HDF5 object. If not, you can simply save it as RDS, or similar and open with the same package. For a low number of samples (depending on your system, but <20, use in-memory object, as it is faster. )

meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_dir, )
```


## Create Methrix report

```{r}
#methrix::methrix_report(meth=meth_object, output_dir = 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/Methrix/')
```


## Remove uncovered loci

```{r}
meth <- methrix::remove_uncovered(m = meth)
#to remove the sex chromosomes, if you want. 
meth <- methrix::subset_methrix(meth, contigs = paste0("chr", 1:22))
```

## QC filtering 

```{r}
# this sets the values to missing for sites with low and too high coverage 

meth <- methrix::mask_methrix(m = meth, low_count = 5)
#this filters the sites which are not covered in s certain percentage of your study population - i.e. remove sites with are not covered in more than 20% or your samples
meth <- methrix::coverage_filter(m=meth, cov_thr = 1, prop_samples = 0.2)


```

## Filter CpG overlappings with SNP

```{r}
library(MafDb.1Kgenomes.phase3.GRCh38)
library(GenomicScores)
meth <- methrix::remove_snps(m = meth)
```

```{r}
meth
```


```{r}
save_HDF5_methrix(meth, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/', replace=T)
```


# Work with QC and SNP filtered data
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_qc_dir)
```


## Beta-values, M-values
```{r}
# mpca <- methrix::methrix_pca(m= meth, top_var = 10000, n_pc = 20, do_plot = F)
# methrix::plot_pca(mpca, m=meth, col_anno = "Group", shape_anno = "replicate")
```


## Subset 100,000 most variable CpG sites
```{r}
meth_ordered <- methrix::order_by_sd(meth)
meth_subset <- meth_ordered[1:100000,]
```

## Subset 100,000 random CpG sites
```{r}
set.seed(16633)
meth_rando_subset <- meth[sample(1:nrow(meth), 100000, replace = F),]
```

## Save subsets as RDS
```{r}
meth_subset <- convert_HDF5_methrix(meth_subset)
saveRDS(meth_subset, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/meth_filt_sd.RDS')

meth_rando_subset <- convert_HDF5_methrix(meth_rando_subset)
saveRDS(meth_rando_subset, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/meth_filt_rand.RDS')
```


## M-values
```{r}
beta <- get_matrix(meth, add_loci = F)
C <- get_matrix(meth, add_loci = F, type = "C")
M <- beta*C
U <- C-M
M_val <- log2((M+0.001)/(U+0.001))
rownames(M_val) <- paste0(meth@elementMetadata$chr, "_", meth@elementMetadata$start)
saveRDS(M_val, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/meth_filt_sd_Mval.RDS')
```
